headline: Palantir Jumps 9% on NVIDIA Sovereign-AI Deal, Palo Alto Networks Climbs 4%
summary: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) stock is up 9% to $127.31 in midday trading on Wednesday, leading a broad AI-software rally after the company unveiled a sovereign-AI partnership with NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA). Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) stock is riding the risk-on tape higher, up 4% to $355.40. The move for Palantir stock caps a sharp reversal for a ... Palantir Jumps 9% on NVIDIA Sovereign-AI Deal, Palo Alto Networks Climbs 4%
